fields.summary: NMClient doesn't have retries for supporting rolling-upgrades

status.description: The issue is considered finished, the resolution is correct. Issues which are not closed can be reopened.
status.name: Closed

issuetype.description: An improvement or enhancement to an existing feature or task.
issuetype.name: Improvement

fields.description: While NM is rolling upgrade, client should retry NM until it comes up. This jira is to add a NMProxy (similar to RMProxy) with retry implementation to support rolling upgrade.

resolution.description: A fix for this issue is checked into the tree and tested.
resolution.name: Fixed

comments.body:
Patch:
- Create a new NMProxy class for instantiating containerManageMentProxy with retry implementation. And created a new common base ServerProxy class.
- Updated existing code to use the new NMProxy class
- Manually tested on a single node cluster. Submit a MR job and kill NM, MR job will retry the NM.

bq. I think it is better to keep consistent to use int or long
good catch, I  changed the one for RMProxy, but missed this. 
bq. Do we have plan to get HADOOP-9576 in? If yes, shall we keep the todo comments here?
I forgot my initial intent to add this comment. As now I followed FailoverOnNetworkExceptionRetry for the exception-retry policy, I found maybe we don't need to do this for now.

Thanks Junping for reviewing the patch !
Addressed the comments.
Also tested with DistributedShell in a single node cluster. AM will retry NM in case NM is down.
